product_data.Features: 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple M3 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 22-hour battery life, MagSafe 3 charging, Thunderbolt 4 ports

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I hope you're doing well! I came across your listing for the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro) and I'm really interested in purchasing it. I was wondering if there's any room for negotiation on the price. 

Looking forward to hearing from you soon. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

Thank you for your interest in the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro)! I can offer you a special price of $2,100 for this premium device. Let me know if this works for you. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer. I appreciate the discount, but unfortunately, my budget for this purchase is $2,499. I am unable to exceed that amount.
